Defines ats_utilities.config_io.ini package.

class ats_utilities.config_io.ini.ATSINIProcessor[source]¶

Bases: IINIProcessor

Defines class ATSINIProcessor with attribute(s) and method(s). Default implementation for processing INI content.

It defines:

attributes:
__config - ConfigParser instance for INI parsing.
methods:
__init__ - Initializes ATSINIProcessor constructor.
from_stream - Load INI content from a stream.
to_stream - Write INI content to a stream.
get_ats_info - Get ATS information from INI.
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
from_stream(stream: Any) → bool[source]¶

Load INI content from a stream.

Parameters:

stream (<Any>) – INI content stream

Returns:

True (content loaded) | False

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

None

get_ats_info() → Dict[str, str][source]¶

Get ATS information from INI.

Returns:

Dictionary with ATS information

Return type:

<Dict[str, str]>

Exceptions:

None

to_stream(stream: Any) → bool[source]¶

Write INI content to a stream.

Parameters:

stream (<Any>) – INI content stream

Returns:

True (content written) | False

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

None

class ats_utilities.config_io.ini.IINIProcessor[source]¶

Bases: ABC

Defines interface IINIProcessor with attribute(s) and method(s). Interface for processing INI content.

It defines:

attributes:

None

methods:
from_stream - Load INI content from a stream (abstract).
to_stream - Write INI content to a stream (abstract).
get_ats_info - Get ATS information from INI (abstract).
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
abstract from_stream(stream: Any) → bool[source]¶

Load INI content from a stream.

Parameters:

stream (<Any>) – INI content stream

Returns:

True (content loaded) | False

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

NotImplementedError

abstract get_ats_info() → Dict[str, str][source]¶

Get ATS information from INI.

Returns:

Dictionary with ATS information

Return type:

<Dict[str, str]>

Exceptions:

NotImplementedError

abstract to_stream(stream: Any) → bool[source]¶

Write INI content to a stream.

Parameters:

stream (<Any>) – INI content stream

Returns:

True (content written) | False

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

NotImplementedError

class ats_utilities.config_io.ini.Ini2Object(config_file: str | None, ini_processor: IINIProcessor | None = None, checker: IATSChecker | None = None, reporter: IATSReporter | None = None, file_checker: IFileCheck | None = None, verbose: bool = False)[source]¶

Bases: IRead

Defines class Ini2Object with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an API for reading configuration from an INI file. Conversion of INI config to Python object.

It defines:

attributes:
ERRORS - Marks error types.
__EXT - File extension of the configuration file.
__MODE - File open mode.
__checker - ATSChecker for check operations.
__reporter - ATSReporter for messaging.
__file_checker - FileCheck for checking file.
__file_path - Configuration file path.
__verbose - Enable/Disable verbose option.
methods:
__init__ - Initials Ini2Object constructor.
read_configuration - reads configuration from an INI file.
ERRORS¶

alias of ErrorChecker

__EXT: str = 'ini'¶
__MODE: str = 'r'¶
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
read_configuration(verbose: bool = False) → IINIProcessor | None[source]¶

Reads a configuration from an INI file.

Parameters:

verbose (<bool>) – Enable/Disable verbose option

Returns:

Configuration object | None

Return type:

IINIProcessor

Exceptions:

None

class ats_utilities.config_io.ini.IniBase(info_file: str | None = None, ini2obj: IRead | None = None, obj2ini: IWrite | None = None, options_parser: IATSOptionParser | None = None, checker: IATSChecker | None = None, reporter: IATSReporter | None = None, file_checker: IFileCheck | None = None, strategy: IATSArgParseStrategy | None = None, verbose: bool = False)[source]¶

Bases: object

Defines class IniBase with attribute(s) and method(s). Loads the ATS configuration for the ATS. INI configuration-based API support.

It defines:

attributes:
ERRORS - Error checker mapping.
__checker - Error checker.
__reporter - ATSReporter for check operations.
__verbose - Enable/Disable verbose option.
__file_checker - FileCheck for checking file.
__ini2obj - In API for information.
__obj2ini - Out API for information.
__tool_operational - Control ATS operational functionality.
__option_parser - Option parser for ATS.
methods:
__init__ - Initials IniBase constructor.
is_tool_ok - Checks is tool operational.
ERRORS¶

alias of ErrorChecker

is_tool_ok() → bool[source]¶

Checks is tool operational.

Returns:

True (tool is operational) | False

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

None

property option_parser: IATSOptionParser¶

Option parser for ATS.

Returns:

Option parser for ATS

Return type:

IATSOptionParser

Exceptions:

None

class ats_utilities.config_io.ini.Object2Ini(config_file: str | None, checker: IATSChecker | None = None, reporter: IATSReporter | None = None, file_checker: IFileCheck | None = None, verbose: bool = False)[source]¶

Bases: IWrite

Defines class Object2Ini with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an API for writing configuration to an INI file. Conversion of Python object to INI content.

It defines:

attributes:
_EXT - File extension of the configuration file.
_verbose - Enable/Disable verbose option.
_file_path - Configuration file path.
methods:
__init__ - Initials Object2Ini constructor.
write_configuration - Writes configuration to an INI file.
ERRORS¶

alias of ErrorChecker

__EXT: str = 'ini'¶
__MODE: str = 'w'¶
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
write_configuration(config: IINIProcessor | None, verbose: bool = False) → bool[source]¶

Writes configuration to a INI file.

Parameters:

  • config (IINIProcessor) – Configuration object | None

  • verbose (<bool>) – enable/disable verbose option

Returns:

True (configuration written to file) | False

Return type:

<bool>

Exception:

ATSTypeError
